title: Start a reflection and save it from the home page
description: This verifies that a user can write a reflection and save it so today's entry is completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Type a reflection into the editor
Save the reflection
Verify today's reflection is marked as completed

title: Complete a daily reflection with autosave
description: Verifies a returning user can write a reflection on the home screen, allow autosave to persist it, and see today marked completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Fill in a reflection in the editor
Wait for autosave to complete
Verify the reflection is saved
Verify today is marked as completed

title: Keep the app open when closing it after 10 PM with an unfinished reflection
description: This verifies that attempting to close the app after 10 PM while today's reflection is still pending keeps the app active and returns the user to the reflection flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Fill in the reflection editor with a short unfinished draft
Attempt to close the app
Verify the reflection editor remains available
Verify today is still marked as pending

title: Stop shutdown while today's reflection is still pending after 10 PM
description: This verifies that a shutdown attempt after 10 PM is delayed until the user completes or skips today's pending reflection.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Fill in the reflection editor with a short unfinished draft
Attempt to shut down the computer
Verify the app remains in focus
Verify the reflection flow is presented

title: Automatically save an in-progress reflection after inactivity
description: This verifies that a user's draft is persisted after a period of inactivity without pressing save.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Type a reflection into the editor
Wait for autosave to complete
Verify the draft is saved for today
Verify today's status shows a completed or saved state

title: Restore an unfinished draft
description: Verifies a returning user with an unfinished draft can restore it on the home screen and continue from the previous content.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Verify a draft recovery prompt is visible
Restore the previous draft
Verify the draft content is loaded into the editor

title: Restore an unfinished reflection after reopening the app
description: This verifies that returning to /home with a previously unfinished draft presents the recovery choice and restores the draft when selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Fill in a reflection draft without saving it
Close the app
Reopen the app and navigate to /home
Choose to restore the previous draft
Verify the unfinished draft is restored in the reflection editor
Verify today remains pending until the draft is saved

title: Save a reflection with the keyboard shortcut
description: This verifies that a user can save today's reflection using the keyboard shortcut and see the saved state.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Type a reflection into the editor
Press Ctrl+S
Verify today's reflection is saved
Verify today's status shows a completed state

title: Allow closing the app after 10 PM once today's reflection is completed
description: This verifies that closing the app after 10 PM proceeds normally when today's reflection has already been saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Fill in the reflection editor with a completed reflection
Save the reflection
Attempt to close the app
Verify the app closes normally
Verify today's reflection is marked as completed

title: Allow shutdown after 10 PM once today's reflection is saved
description: This verifies that a shutdown attempt after 10 PM proceeds normally after the user saves today's reflection.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Fill in the reflection editor with a completed reflection
Save the reflection
Attempt to shut down the computer
Verify the system action proceeds normally
Verify today's reflection remains completed

title: Complete first onboarding and reach the home page
description: This verifies that a first-time user can finish onboarding and land on the main reflection screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /welcome
Verify the onboarding welcome screen is displayed
Complete onboarding
Verify the home page is displayed

title: Complete first reflection from onboarding
description: Verifies a first-time user can move from onboarding to the home screen and complete their first reflection so today is marked done.

steps.description: Navigate to /welcome
Click the action to begin using the app
Verify the user lands on the home screen
Fill in a reflection in the editor
Save the reflection
Verify today is marked as completed

title: Skip today and confirm the decision
description: This verifies that a user can intentionally skip the day and see that choice reflected in today's status.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Choose to skip today
Confirm the skip
Verify today's status shows a skipped state

title: Skip today with confirmation
description: Verifies a user can intentionally skip today’s reflection and confirm the skip so today is recorded as skipped.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Open the skip today action
Confirm the skip
Verify today is marked as skipped

title: Restore an unfinished draft after returning to the app
description: This verifies that a returning user can recover an unfinished draft and continue editing it.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Type a partial reflection into the editor
Wait for the draft to be preserved
Return to the home page with the unfinished draft present
Restore the previous draft
Verify the recovered draft is displayed in the editor

title: Discard an unfinished reflection after reopening the app
description: This verifies that returning to /home with a previously unfinished draft lets the user discard it and start fresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Fill in a reflection draft without saving it
Close the app
Reopen the app and navigate to /home
Choose to discard the previous draft
Verify the reflection editor is empty
Verify today's reflection remains pending

title: Review reflection history and search results
description: Verifies a user can search the history list and see the reflections filtered to the entered keyword.

steps.description: Navigate to /history
Fill in a keyword in the search field
Verify the reflection list is filtered to matching entries

title: Review reflection history and search for past entries
description: This verifies that a user can open history, search reflections, and see matching past entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /history
Enter a search query for a past reflection
Verify matching reflection entries are displayed

title: Discard an unfinished draft
description: Verifies a returning user can discard an unfinished draft on the home screen and return to a clean editor state.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Verify a draft recovery prompt is visible
Discard the previous draft
Verify the editor is empty

title: Keep pending reflection state across returning to the app
description: This verifies that today's pending reflection state is preserved locally when the user leaves and returns to the app without saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Fill in a reflection draft without saving it
Close the app
Reopen the app and navigate to /home
Verify the unfinished draft is available for recovery
Verify today's reflection is still pending

title: Open and close a past reflection in the read-only viewer
description: This verifies that a user can inspect a saved reflection in the viewer and return to the history list.

steps.description: Navigate to /history
Open a reflection from the history list
Verify the read-only reflection viewer is displayed
Close the reflection viewer
Verify the history list is displayed

title: View statistics dashboard metrics
description: Verifies a user can open the statistics page and see the core consistency metrics needed for progress review.

steps.description: Navigate to /statistics
Verify current streak, longest streak, total reflections, total words, average reflection length, and days missed are displayed

title: Discard an unfinished draft after returning to the app
description: This verifies that a returning user can remove an unfinished draft and return to a clean editor state.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Type a partial reflection into the editor
Wait for the draft to be preserved
Return to the home page with the unfinished draft present
Discard the previous draft
Verify the draft is removed from the editor

title: Follow the first launch onboarding into the home reflection flow
description: This verifies that a first-time user can complete onboarding from /welcome and land on /home ready to write or skip today's reflection.

steps.description: Navigate to /welcome
Complete the onboarding flow
Proceed to the home screen
Verify the reflection editor is displayed
Verify today's status is ready for a first reflection

title: Open and close a reflection viewer
description: Verifies a user can open a past reflection in read-only mode and close the viewer to return to the history list.

steps.description: Navigate to /history
Open a reflection from the list
Verify the read-only reflection viewer is visible
Close the reflection viewer
Verify the history list is visible

title: View the activity heatmap on the home page
description: This verifies that a user can inspect the contribution heatmap shown on the home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Verify the activity heatmap is displayed

title: Reset all local data after confirmation
description: Verifies a user can reset all local app data from settings and see the app return to an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Open settings
Start the reset all data action
Confirm the reset
Verify all local data is cleared

title: Review current and long-term consistency statistics
description: This verifies that a user can open the statistics page and see their streak and consistency summary.

steps.description: Navigate to /statistics
Verify streak statistics are displayed
Verify consistency summary data is displayed

title: Manage startup preference and local backups
description: Verifies a user can open settings from the home screen, change the startup preference, and export a local backup.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Open settings
Toggle launch on startup
Verify the startup preference is updated
Export a local backup as SQLite
Verify a backup export is completed

title: Import a local backup after confirmation
description: Verifies a user can import a SQLite or JSON backup from settings, confirm the import, and see restored local data.

steps.description: Navigate to /home
Open settings
Import a local backup file
Confirm the import
Verify restored data is visible
